name: meep-inverse-design-v1
description: Paper-oriented benchmark suite for agentic photonic inverse design with standalone and cross-simulator MEEP workflows.
paper_hypothesis: An autoresearcher-style agent can drive reproducible photonic inverse-design campaigns with useful optimization progress while preserving artifact and provenance quality.

baseline_notes: Compare against random search using the same campaign budget.
Compare against the default optimizer without workflow transfer validation.
Record whether provenance and stage mapping artifacts were present for every run.
